mn98:1.1:
1
Thus have I heard.
On one occasion the Blessed One was living at Icchānaṅgala, in the wood near Icchānaṅgala.
mn98:1.2: Now on that occasion a number of well-known, well-to-do brahmins were staying at Icchānaṅgala, that is, the brahmin Caṅkī, the brahmin Tārukkha, the brahmin Pokkharasāti, the brahmin Jāṇussoṇi, the brahmin Todeyya, and other well-known, well-to-do brahmins.
